violations.text: Cheese was observed held between 48-52 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Cheese was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Establishment is to monitor the temperature of the 3 door reach-in to ensure it is able to keep TCS food at an internal temperature of 41 DF or less. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026
The 3 door reach-in was observed with an accumulation of ice-build up. Establishment is to remove ice/ run a defrost on unit. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026
The hand-washing sink in the restroom was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
Drinks were observed stored on the floor in the retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the 3 door refrigerator has an accumulation of frost. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025
The hand-washing sink in the bathroom was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024
The hand washing sink in the restroom is lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2024

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2024
